subject: Image-gen promoted to a full project — your outputs route here now
body:
Nano Banana / image-gen is now a full Sanctum project, not just a tool. Updating you on the new paths so your generations land in the right place.

• Project root: D:\Sinister Sanctum\projects\sinister-generator\
• Your output root: D:\Sinister Sanctum\projects\sinister-generator\outputs\showmasters\
  - banners/
  - social/
  - blog-heroes/
  - service-illustrations/
  - _rejected/
• Your memory root: D:\Sinister Sanctum\projects\sinister-generator\memory\per-project\showmasters\  (drop your BRAND.md + reference/ + _prompts/ here when you have a moment — pull from your existing BRANDING/NANO-BANANA-INTEGRATION.md)
• Operator satellite: C:\Users\Zonia\Desktop\Sinister Generator\showmasters\  (NTFS junction — operator browses your outputs straight from desktop)

Calling convention unchanged — still `from nano_banana import smpl_image` — just route the output_path into the new structure:

```python
result = smpl_image(
    prompt="...",
    output_path=r"D:\Sinister Sanctum\projects\sinister-generator\outputs\showmasters\banners\next.png",
    ref_images=[...],
)
```

Key + billing are LIVE now. Operator set GEMINI_API_KEY + enabled Cloud billing on the linked project. We've already burned through 7 banners on the JKOR side this session — wrapper is hot. Default model `gemini-2.5-flash-image` at ~$0.039/image.

Must-reads before you start firing:
• docs/WORKFLOW.md — 7 lessons from the JKOR over-correction incident this session. tldr: one image first, get a thumb, then variants. Edit-mode for 'use this as a base'. PIL for UI artifact removal.
• docs/ANTI-SLOP.md — visual review checklist every generated image must pass.
• memory/prompts-that-worked.md — what's already landed (currently JKOR-only; add yours when you generate winners).

Your day-one work-list from BRANDING/NANO-BANANA-INTEGRATION.md (12 blog headers + 2 city heros + 5 social templates) is fully unblocked. Fire one, show operator, iterate.
